teleportcakes.name: Teleport Cakes
tooltip.teleportcakes.aggregate_cupcake: §7Hold §eShift§r §7and scroll to change destination, then eat to teleport.
tooltip.teleportcakes.end_cake: §7When eaten it will transport you to the End.
tooltip.teleportcakes.nether_cake: §7When eaten it will transport you to the Nether.
tooltip.teleportcakes.overworld_cupcake: §7When eaten it will transport you to your Overworld respawn point.
tooltip.teleportcakes.nether_cupcake: §7When eaten it will transport you to the Nether.
tooltip.teleportcakes.end_cupcake: §7When eaten it will transport you to the End.

msg.teleportcakes.cannot_eat_nether_cake: You can't eat Nether Cake at the nether

msg.teleportcakes.cannot_eat_while_ridin: You can't eat teleport cakes while riding

config.teleportcakes.title: Teleport Cakes settings
config.teleportcakes.enable_tooltips_for: Enable the display of all item tooltips (master switch)
After disabling, all prompts, including those related to "§7Hold§r §eShift§r", will not be displayed
Enable Tooltip display while holding Shift
After disabling, "§7Hold§r §eShift§r" and the prompt after pressing it will no longer be displayed; the rest will display normally
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.teleportc: Adds cakes for teleportation between various dimensions.
